suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure mission feature skillName values only reference installed skills and require mission transcript indexing/handoff artifacts to include each completed worker session for reviewer evidence access.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review f-fix-m2-scrutiny-2 reported skillName "worker" with empty project .factory/skills and missing mission-local transcript/handoff index for session 65cb0061-aeaa-48ce-8229-50c3080af97f.
